reasoning: As of March 29, 2026, the New Orleans Pelicans have a win-loss record of 25-50 after consecutive losses to the Pistons (129-108 on March 26) and the Raptors (119-106 on March 27). To exceed 30.5 wins, they must attain 31 wins in the 82-game regular season. Having played 75 games, they only have 7 games remaining in the season. Therefore, they need to win at least 6 of their final 7 games to cache the over. Given their season-long win rate of exactly 33.3%, the statistical probability of going 6-1 or 7-0 over a 7-game stretch is well under 1%. They are also already mathematically eliminated from playoff contention and playing out the string. I am assigning the lowest allowable probability of 0.02.
